name: Mexican Lasagna
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the ground beef until browned and drained well. Add the chopped onion and continue to cook until the onion is translucent.
2. Remove from heat. Stir in the refried beans, oregano, cumin, and garlic powder.
3. Place 4 noodles at the bottom of a 13x9x2 inch baking pan coated with non-stick spray or lightly greased.
4. Spread 1/3 of the meat mixture over the noodles.
5. Top with 1/3 cup shredded Monterey jack cheese and 1/3 cup shredded cheddar cheese.
6. Continue layering the ingredients in the same manner.
7. Cover the pan with foil and bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 hour.
8. Remove from the oven and top with sour cream, sliced green onions, sliced black olives, and additional Monterey jack cheese.
9. Return to the oven without covering for an additional 15 minutes or until the cheese is melted.
